summary: Shared patrol knowledge, regulations, and rumors common among Old Market guards.
known_facts: The underground ruins are restricted after dusk.
The Reincarnation Festival requires double patrols around the archive annex.
The Merchant Guild funds extra watch shifts during heavy market days.
rumors: Chroniclers hide witness records that contradict official family lineages.
One stair in the ruins changes depth between patrols.
unknowns: Why some archive orders override guild writs.
What lies beyond the broken oath gate.
notes: Guard knowledge emphasizes orders, patrol routes, and restricted zones.
